cases.name: consult distilled knowledge
cases.query: ask an index for a distilled answer instead of scanning source files

cases.name: precision rejects false relationships
cases.query: an incorrect relationship is more harmful than leaving one absent

expected.contains: wrong connection is worse than none

cases.name: private vendor independent memory
cases.query: keep sensitive project knowledge on this machine without depending on a vendor

cases.name: borrow structural parsers
cases.query: reuse a parser to identify functions calls and imports rather than writing one

cases.name: model change targeted vectors
cases.query: switching representation models should recompute only the necessary vectors

cases.name: stdio tool cannot switch indexes
cases.query: a tool request must not choose a different index file than the server started with

cases.name: changed unreadable source removes old results
cases.query: if an edited document becomes unreadable do not continue serving its previous text

cases.name: stable corpus nickname derives storage
cases.query: clients use a stable corpus nickname while the database location is computed locally

cases.name: nearest parent agent contract
cases.query: which parent folder instructions govern work inside a nested repository

cases.name: convert database row to domain chunk
cases.query: translate a SQLite result record into the in-memory sourced chunk structure
